overall.description: Nighttime driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a neon-lit futuristic city. The vehicle travels from a sunken highway through commercial intersections with prominent billboards, gas stations, and stadiums, stopping at multiple traffic lights along multi-lane avenues.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunken highway exit ramp transitioning to commercial intersection

events.description: exits sunken highway underpass into open urban intersection with 24/7 store visible
vehicle stops at red traffic light at intersection

agents.ego_description: driving through sunken highway corridor and braking to stop at red light at the intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: car ahead stopped at the red traffic light

entered.detail: tall concrete walls lining both sides of the sunken highway
convenience store with bright illuminated 24/7 signage and green accents
fuel station with overhead canopy and illuminated pumps
large metal truss structure spanning the road with multiple digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a sunken highway corridor with concrete walls on both sides, then transitions to an open intersection. The vehicle approaches and stops at a red light near a 24/7 convenience store and gas station, with overhead billboard structures visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with overhead digital billboards

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, vehicle prepares to move

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light, observing the intersection and waiting for signal change

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking on sidewalk near the intersection corner

entered.detail: red street sign with white text indicating Marseille street
modern building with reflective glass facade and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Stopped at the intersection beneath a massive overhead billboard gantry displaying neon advertisements. The Marseille street sign is visible ahead. The vehicle waits at the red light with other traffic, then proceeds as the light turns green.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane avenue with tall commercial buildings

events.description: vehicle accelerates through the green light and drives under the billboard gantry
camera tilts upward to view large red illuminated billboard on building facade

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the intersection and driving down the avenue, briefly looking up at tall buildings

entered.detail: tall industrial building with large red illuminated advertisement on upper floors
red street sign indicating Venice street at the next intersection
concrete industrial structure with metal piping and ventilation

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through the intersection and under the overhead billboard structure, proceeding down a multi-lane avenue. The camera briefly tilts up to show a massive red billboard on a tall building before approaching the Venice street intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with large ventilation structures

events.description: vehicle stops at red light at Venice intersection
light turns green and vehicle proceeds through intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light at Venice intersection, then accelerating through as light changes

entered.detail: large industrial building with massive circular ventilation fans and metal scaffolding
red street sign indicating Crestmont street ahead

segments.scene_description: Stopped at the Venice intersection next to a large industrial building with prominent ventilation structures. The vehicle waits at the red light, then proceeds through the intersection as the signal changes, approaching the Crestmont street sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial avenue with stadium and large digital displays

events.description: passing large stadium structure with bright floodlights on the left side

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through the Crestmont area, passing the stadium and continuing down the multi-lane road

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large sports stadium with bright white floodlights and curved roof structure
tall tower with circular digital billboard displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: Driving through the Crestmont intersection with a large stadium visible on the left and a prominent circular digital billboard tower on the right. The vehicle continues down the avenue, passing road barriers and street lights as it moves deeper into the commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a confined sunken highway into the expansive, neon-lit heart of a futuristic commercial district. It begins within a concrete highway corridor before emerging into an open intersection, where the vehicle pauses at a red light beside a 24/7 convenience store and gas station. As the light turns green, the camera glides beneath a massive overhead billboard gantry and passes a Marseille street sign, briefly tilting upward to capture a towering red advertisement on a nearby skyscraper. The scene then shifts toward the Venice intersection, stopping momentarily next to a large industrial building with prominent ventilation structures before proceeding toward the Crestmont street sign. Finally, the journey opens up as the vehicle passes a massive stadium on the left and a circular digital billboard tower on the right, moving deeper into the city's glowing urban landscape.
